title: conchium gibbosum
intro: Conchium gibbosum, also known as hairy buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Conchium gibbosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams for its medicinal and health benefits.
